seoTitle: Corney Town vs Cornwallis — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Corney Town and Cornwallis. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Corney Town vs Cornwallis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Corney Town and Cornwallis.
heading: Corney Town vs Cornwallis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Corney Town, New South Wales and Cornwallis, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Corney Town has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Cornwallis (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Corney Town or Cornwallis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Corney Town has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Cornwallis scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Corney Town scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Cornwallis scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Corney Town or Cornwallis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Corney Town has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
